status: 24-Apr-2026: Modon/CWRC/Moonflower HSE and module scoping calls clarified fleet management and medical case register scope. Fleet management is not applicable for Alrayan, Moonflower will confirm whether 8-10 internal golf cars should be onboarded, and medical case logging will be integrated into existing HSE incident flows. A separate HSE data clarification confirmed the risk matrix is the remaining HSE data item, with more specific data request protocols agreed after CWRC frustration around imprecise requests.

active_risks.text: Moonflower golf car fleet management confirmation is pending, creating minor scope uncertainty
Imprecise HSE data requests have caused internal back-and-forth and may create rework if the new protocol is not followed

open_items.text: Confirm fleet management requirement for Moonflower golf cars
Share occupational and non-occupational first aid report templates
Provide the remaining HSE risk matrix data for CWRC
Move shared compliance documents into the shared folder

recent_decisions.text: Fleet management will not proceed for Alrayan at this time
Medical case logging will be integrated into existing HSE incident flows
Moonflower will confirm golf car fleet management applicability by Monday
Future HSE data requests must be specific and granular, with Facilio providing existing templates to avoid duplication
Project H&S plan has been deprioritized
